body_excerpt: In getTitle of AccessPoint.java, there is a possible unhandled exception due to a missing null check. This could lead to remote denial of service if a proximal Wi-Fi AP provides invalid information with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
